title: "Townfall" - Dungeon in the sky
body:
![the girl with the sword on the front says townfall.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5e94ba50003fb6e89a19874a94b7810d9f63d4f.png)
Townfall adds a sky town - dungeon in the vein of the old dungeon crawlers with custom coloured loot and mini bosses. All of this works on the data capabilities of minecraft itself, so the mod is supposed to be compatible with other mods. I tried to create a little story with riddles traders legendary swords and dark fantasy elements, if you put still my texture pack created just for this dungeon (from the discord link)

### Townfall features the following:
- A in the sky fully customised dungeon with random rooms corridors secrets and redstone mechanisms with mini stories. 
- The dungeon is not just faceless corridors, it functions and lives like a city as it should be with points of interest and important urban locations, sewers for more immersion. 
- Many rooms and some corridors and areas will appear exclusively only in your variant dungeon providing a unique experience. 
- The dungeon is a multi-level structure with sewers, the city streets themselves, the roof level and buildings that rise up even higher.
- The dungeon encourages flying and falling, using custom potions tied to teleportation and levitation that you find, the risk is fun. 
- Experimentally altered monsters dont like to be tricked and fight back with their rotten skin or their aura confuses the mind, so youll have to think about how to kill them differently. 
- In the dungeon you can find animal friends and custom merchants. With the resource pack will change the appearance of villagers, monsters will also become more gloomy with the vibe of the city eaten by diseases.

###   Configurations:
- the dungeon is friendly to any shader texture packs, but it comes with its own texture pack that changes a lot of things in the dungeon, adding an atmosphere of cold and lostness.
- it does not change anything in your game outside of its borders and modified items and potions will only be in town.
- I have not changed the vanilla keys that you can open trial chests and you can use them indefinitely although for rp I scattered around the city secret chests with keys.
- swords pickaxes axes and armour and other loot from the chests has balance and no netherite. from the trial chests you can take out things that have specific lore enchantments and are a stronger version of what you find in the regular chests.
- The sky dungeon is a real city if you defeat everyone and disarm the spawners, it can be used for different farms, rp, mini games and other purposes.
- If you want to immediately find a dungeon use the command /locate stucture with townfall:dungeon
- the dungeon appears only in the biome snowy slopes, to get up there you need to find a smoking brick house.
- the zombie horse mini boss can be tamed if you wait for its aura of darkness to end and use a saddle

You can join my discord channel for feedback, for help, request or ideas.

[![discordpixellogo-150x150.png](https://i.postimg.cc/6qLqkDyg/discordpixellogo-150x150.png)](https://discord.gg/QVB6XgRf)

[and check out my other work on planet minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/redcapecraft/)
